scenarios.scenario: AI draft begins from call my daughter after per-card consent
scenarios.observed: Draft contract preserves target/cue and returns editable caregiver prompt, cue sequence, and stop condition without approval.

scenarios.scenario: Edited unapproved card remains outside approved list
scenarios.observed: Persisted draft is filtered from approvedCards until explicit approval.

scenarios.scenario: Cloud AI unavailable or consent declined
scenarios.observed: Manual starting point and full editor remain available; missing configuration returns a user-facing fallback.

scenarios.scenario: Approved card survives relaunch and can be revised or deleted
scenarios.observed: Atomic local JSON persistence reloads exact target and approval state; editor and delete controls are wired.
